'''zanuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oscheoplasty|oscheoplasty]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oscheoplasty|oscheoplasty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zanuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæniwith|zæniwith]] || [[word:zæniwij|zæniwij]] || [[word:zæniwish|zæniwish]] || [[word:zæniwi|zæniwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanunuwuth|zanunuwuth]] || [[word:zanunuwuj|zanunuwuj]] || [[word:zanunuwush|zanunuwush]] || [[word:zanunuwu|zanunuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanuwuth|zanuwuth]] || [[word:zanuwuj|zanuwuj]] || [[word:zanuwush|zanuwush]] || [[word:zanuwu|zanuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanufwufth|zanufwufth]] || [[word:zanufwufj|zanufwufj]] || [[word:zanufwufsh|zanufwufsh]] || [[word:zanufwuf|zanufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanuwuthu|zanuwuthu]] || [[word:zanuwuju|zanuwuju]] || [[word:zanuwushu|zanuwushu]] || [[word:zanuwuku|zanuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanuwuth|zanuwuth]] || [[word:zanuwuj|zanuwuj]] || [[word:zanuwush|zanuwush]] || [[word:zanuwu|zanuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanuwuthul|zanuwuthul]] || [[word:zanuwujul|zanuwujul]] || [[word:zanuwushul|zanuwushul]] || [[word:zanuwukul|zanuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanuwuuthuthu|zanuwuuthuthu]] || [[word:zanuwuujuju|zanuwuujuju]] || [[word:zanuwuushushu|zanuwuushushu]] || [[word:zanuwuuku|zanuwuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanuwuthun|zanuwuthun]] || [[word:zanuwujun|zanuwujun]] || [[word:zanuwushun|zanuwushun]] || [[word:zanuwukun|zanuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanuwuthuoro|zanuwuthuoro]] || [[word:zanuwujuoro|zanuwujuoro]] || [[word:zanuwushuoro|zanuwushuoro]] || [[word:zanuwukuoro|zanuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b470777}}
